title: EPC Sewerage Scope — Design through O&M Take-Over
text_english: The Bidder SHALL be RESPONSIBLE for: (i) DESIGN, ENGINEERING (considering already-laid sewerage network and using materials available at project site); (ii) MANUFACTURING, SHOP FABRICATION, ASSEMBLY, TESTING and INSPECTION at supplier's works; (iii) PACKING, DISPATCH, SHIPPING, INDIAN PORT delivery/unloading (for imported equipment) AND SITE delivery/unloading (for indigenous equipment); (iv) STORAGE at site; (v) INSURANCE up to TIME of TAKE-OVER/HAND-OVER by Employer at the END of O&M PERIOD; (vi) HANDLING at site; (vii) COMPLETE ERECTION, START-UP, COMMISSIONING, PERFORMANCE TESTING and HANDING OVER of the FULL PACKAGE; (viii) WARRANTY and DEFECT LIABILITY PERIOD. Upon issue of COMPLETION CERTIFICATE, the Bidder SHALL be RESPONSIBLE for {{om_years}} (default 2) YEARS of OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE of the complete Facility from the date of issue.
